targets.query: from(bucket: "ntn") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ntn_isl") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "isl_range_km")
from(bucket: "ntn") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ntn_isl") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "isl_load_mbps")

from(bucket: "ntn") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ntn_sat_pos") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sat_x_m" or r._field == "sat_y_m" or r._field == "sat_z_m")
